#503B JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID MCCAROILLE; JGWONG/CLERK CASE SETTLED BY STIPULATION; NOT ON THE RECORD

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CARROLL, JAMES THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 64 TURK STREET, #306, S.F., STAYED UNTIL FEB-17-1998, LEASE FORFEITED, 5PM. NO FURTHER STAYS. IF DEFT FAILS TO VACATE, DEFT TO PAY $400- RENT&DAMAGES + $11.43 PER DAY FROM 1/9/98 THRU 2/17/98 + $168- COSTS (TOTAL $1,025.20). MUTUAL WAIVER OF ALL CLAIMS INCL 1542CC. PROPERTY LEFT DEEMED ABANDONED. NO ONE ELSE HAS RIGHT TO CLAIM POSSESSION. SECURITY DEP FORFEITED TO PLTF.
